use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms and applications
Interactive UI elements with multiple visual states
Composable button patterns via asChild composition
Accessible focus states for keyboard navigation
ai_summary: A flexible button component with multiple style variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options (default, sm, lg, icon). Built on Radix UI Slot for composition patterns, featuring hover states, focus-visible keyboard navigation rings, and disabled state handling. Forms a foundational interactive element in design systems.
